name: PayPay for Developers
description: Japans #1 QR wallet PayPay — APIs for Dynamic/Static QR payments, refunds and pre-auth in 65M-user ecosystem.

seo.title: PayPay for Developers — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: PayPay for Developers: Japans #1 QR wallet PayPay — APIs for Dynamic/Static QR payments, refunds and pre-auth in 65M-user ecosystem.

when_to_use: Dynamic QR code payments for Japan point-of-sale systems
In-app PayPay checkout for Japanese mobile commerce
Pre-authorization and capture for Japanese hospitality apps
Refund flows and webhooks for PayPay merchant settlements

review.verdict: If you sell in Japan, PayPay is near-mandatory, but expect Japanese-first docs and slow approvals.
review.best_for: Merchants targeting Japanese consumers who pay via the PayPay QR wallet
review.not_for: Teams outside Japan or those needing fast English-first onboarding

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
